module_4

app

src.app.create_app(test_config=None) → Flask

Create and configure the Flask application.

Initializes a Flask app instance with static and template folders, registers the main blueprint, and loads configuration from config.py.

Parameters:

test_config (dict or None) – Optional configuration mapping to override the default configuration. If None, the app loads from config.py. Defaults to None.

Returns:

A configured Flask application instance.

Return type:

Flask
